title: Mammalian Cell Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4qj16","text":"This protocol details how to stain mammalian cells cultured on a 96-well plate. Actin filaments, focal adhesion sites (as indicated by the presence of vinculin), and nuclei will be stained.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5hv6l","text":"Gloves must be worn at all times.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3g1gb","text":"Perform all tasks within biosafety cabinet.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ikql","text":"Anything entering biosafety cabinet must be generously sprayed with 70% ethanol (even you).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8vuab","text":"When finished, wipe biosafety cabinet with 70% ethanol, and UV for at least 15 minutes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"d3gln","text":"Warm DPBS in    water bath.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":13,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"e40u2","text":"Wash waste beaker with soap and warm water, then dry with paper towel.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4vlo2","text":"Expose waste beaker to UV for at least  .","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":39,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"eisl1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"16B8B41087B311E98C18218EE60AF2A9","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"Mammalian Cell Staining","temperature":"37","unit":10}},"1":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":900,"guid":"2F59547087B311E98C18218EE60AF2A9","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"Mammalian Cell Staining"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ku2l","text":"4% Paraformaldehyde solution","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"98ku8","text":"0.1% Triton X-100 solution in PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7ftr","text":"Blocking buffer (PBS + 1% bovine serum albumin)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1d1n2","text":"Anti-vinculin solution (1:500 in blocking buffer)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7aqf1","text":"TRITC and FITC-conjugated secondary antibody solution (1:1:248, TRITC:FITC:blocking buffer) referred to as FITC:TRITC, prepared in opaque centrifuge tube","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fddhj","text":"DAPI solution (1:249 DAPI:blockingbuffer) prepared in opaque centrifuge tube","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"des2o","text":"Phosphate buffered saline (PBS)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3cgr0","text":"Washing buffer (PBS + 0.05% Tween-20)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Remove cell culture media. You may wash twice with DPBS at this point.
Add 100 µL of Anti-Vinculin and blocking buffer mixture.
Add 100 µL of 4 % volume paraformaldehyde solution.
Label the flask with: Cell line Passage number Date Your intials
Add 100 µL of 0.1 % volume Triton X-100.
Wash twice with 100 µL washing buffer.

Incubate for 01:00:00 . Increasing this duration can greatly increase FITC-conjugated secondary antibody binding. It is acceptable to place covered plate in refrigerator overnight. While waiting on this incubation, it is a good time to prepare the combined dye solution.
Add 100 µL PBS to prevent dessication of cells during imaging/storage.
creator: Kenneth Schackart
